13.reason: Error: This should be 'else if' instead of 'if' to avoid printing '-' when the first condition is true but the second is false.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: This should be 'else if' instead of 'if' to avoid printing '-' when the first condition is true but the second is false.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing else before this if; when the first condition is true, this and subsequent conditions are still evaluated, causing the else to attach only to the last if, leading to incorrect output for valid expansions.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  out-of-bounds access; should be else if
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  should be else if, otherwise after a successful lowercase expansion, this and the next if are still evaluated, leading to extra '-' being printed.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Should be 'else if' to form a proper conditional chain and prevent multiple blocks from executing.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Should be 'else if' to correctly chain the conditions; otherwise, the final 'else' block executes incorrectly when earlier conditions are true, causing duplicate '-' output.

17.reason: Error: This should be 'else if' instead of 'if' to avoid printing '-' when the first or second condition is true but the third is false.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: This should be 'else if' instead of 'if' to avoid printing '-' when the first or second condition is true but the third is false.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  Missing else before this if; same issue as above, the else on line 18 only applies to this if, so when a valid expansion occurs, the else may incorrectly print '-'.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  out-of-bounds access; should be else if
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  should be else if, same reason.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Should be 'else if' to correctly chain the conditions.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  Should be 'else if' for the same reason; using independent 'if' statements causes the 'else' to attach only to the last 'if', leading to logical errors in control flow.

7.reason: potential out-of-bounds access at i=0 (s[i-1]) and i=len-1 (s[i+1] may be null, but isdigit etc. return false for null)

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  compilation error: variable declaration inside for loop not allowed in C89/C90; also potential out-of-bounds when i is first or last
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  potential out-of-bounds access at i=0 (s[i-1]) and i=len-1 (s[i+1] may be null, but isdigit etc. return false for null)

9.reason: Accessing s[i-1] when i=0 causes out-of-bounds error; should check i > 0.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  out-of-bounds access if i==0 or i==len(s)-1; should be chained with else if to avoid spurious '-' output
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Accessing s[i-1] when i=0 causes out-of-bounds error; should check i > 0.

20.reason: This else only pairs with the isdigit check, causing '-' to be printed incorrectly when islower or isupper conditions are met.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  else is attached only to the last if; incorrect control flow causes missing '-' for digit left>=right and extra '-' for lower/upper expansions
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  This else only pairs with the isdigit check, causing '-' to be printed incorrectly when islower or isupper conditions are met.

21.reason: [The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (isdigit), not the entire group. This causes '-' to be printed even when one of the earlier conditions (like islower or isupper) was true, leading to duplicate output or incorrect behavior. It should use 'else if' chaining like the reference program.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  This else is attached only to the last if, so after a successful lowercase or uppercase expansion, this else will also execute, printing an extra '-'. Should be part of an if-else if-else chain.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (isdigit), not the entire group. This causes '-' to be printed even when one of the earlier conditions (like islower or isupper) was true, leading to duplicate output or incorrect behavior. It should use 'else if' chaining like the reference program.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The 'else' only applies to the last 'if' (isdigit), not the entire group. This causes '-' to be printed even when one of the earlier conditions (like islower or isupper) was true, leading to duplicate output or incorrect behavior. Also, no bounds checking for i-1 or i+1 may cause undefined behavior on strings starting or ending with '-'.]
